sourcesContent:
import { alpha, Checkbox, Container, FormControlLabel, Grid, InputBase, makeStyles, Paper, Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableContainer, TableHead, TableRow, Toolbar, Typography } from '@material-ui/core' import { Search } from '@material-ui/icons'; import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react' import axios from 'axios' const useStyle = makeStyles(theme => { return { tableHead: { backgroundColor: 'rgba(128, 128, 128, 0.527)', }, title: { marginTop: '7px' }, search: { position: 'relative', borderRadius: theme.shape.borderRadius, backgroundColor: alpha(theme.palette.common.white, 0.15), '&:hover': { backgroundColor: alpha(theme.palette.common.white, 0.25), }, marginRight: theme.spacing(2), marginLeft: 0, width: '100%', [theme.breakpoints.up('sm')]: { marginLeft: theme.spacing(3), width: 'auto', }, }, searchIcon: { padding: theme.spacing(0, 2), height: '100%', position: 'absolute', pointerEvents: 'none', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center', }, inputRoot: { color: 'inherit', }, inputInput: { padding: theme.spacing(1, 1, 1, 0), // vertical padding + font size from searchIcon paddingLeft: `calc(1em + ${theme.spacing(4)}px)`, transition: theme.transitions.create('width'), width: '100%', [theme.breakpoints.up('md')]: { width: '20ch', }, }, } }) export default function Admin() { const classes = useStyle(); useEffect(() => { showStudents(); showClassrooms(); }, []); const [students, setStudent] = useState([]); function showStudents() { axios.get('http://localhost:80/api/getStudents.php') .then((response) => { setStudent(response.data); if(response.data.Status == 'Invalid') { alert('Invalid User'); } else { // navigate('/teacherDashboard') } }) }; function showClassrooms() { axios.get('http://localhost:80/api/getClassrooms.php') .then((response) => { setStudent(response.data); if(response.data.Status == 'Invalid') { alert('Invalid User'); } else { // navigate('/teacherDashboard') } }) } return ( <> {/* ADMIN */}
Admins
ID Student ID Name Password 1 101190604 Cris Philip V. Cajurao test1
{/* STUDENTS LIST */}
Student List
ID Student ID Name Password {students.map(student => ( {student.id} {student.studentID} {student.name} {student.password} ))}

Classroom List

) }
